data.title: British American Tobacco Announces Major Holdings Change
data.description:
British American Tobacco ( (GB:BATS) ) has provided an update.

British American Tobacco has announced a change in major holdings, with Spring Mountain Investments Ltd acquiring a significant percentage of voting rights. This acquisition, which crosses a notable threshold, may impact the company’s governance and influence its strategic decisions, reflecting a shift in stakeholder dynamics.

More about British American Tobacco

British American Tobacco p.l.c. is a leading company in the tobacco industry, primarily engaged in the production and sale of cigarettes and other nicotine products. The company operates globally and focuses on providing a wide range of tobacco and nicotine products to consumers worldwide.

data.title: PDS Biotech Advances Cancer Immunotherapy with New Clinical Trial
data.description:
NetScientific ( (GB:EMVC) ) has shared an update.

PDS Biotechnology, a portfolio company of EMV Capital, has initiated a Phase 3 clinical trial for its lead immunotherapy program, Versamune® HPV, targeting HPV16-positive head and neck squamous cell cancers. The trial, which aligns with FDA guidelines and includes Fast Track designation, aims to improve patient outcomes with its innovative combination therapy. Financially, PDS Biotech reported a reduced net loss for 2024, primarily due to decreased operating expenses, and announced a $22 million registered direct offering to support its clinical programs.

More about NetScientific

EMV Capital plc, formerly known as NetScientific plc, is a deep tech and life sciences venture capital investment group with an international portfolio of high-growth companies. The company focuses on generating superior returns for investors from fast-growing sectors and technologies, investing in and managing early-stage IP-rich companies. EMV Capital holds both direct equity stakes and carried interest in its portfolio companies, supporting growth and value creation through proactive management and strategic investments.

YTD Price Performance: -15.64%

Average Trading Volume: 30,745

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: £11.38M

data.title: Scinai Immunotherapeutics to Acquire Pincell for Novel Skin Disorder Treatment
data.description:
Scinai Immunotherapeutics ( (SCNI) ) has issued an update.

On March 27, 2025, Scinai Immunotherapeutics announced a binding option agreement to acquire Pincell srl, an Italian biotech firm, and its novel antibody, PC111, aimed at treating severe dermatological conditions like Pemphigus and Stevens-Johnson Syndrome. This strategic move, coupled with a €12 million grant application under the EU’s FENG program, positions Scinai to advance PC111’s development, potentially offering a non-immunosuppressive treatment for these conditions, which lack effective alternatives. The acquisition and development of PC111 could significantly enhance Scinai’s market position in the biopharmaceutical industry, addressing a critical unmet medical need and potentially leading to accelerated regulatory approval.

More about Scinai Immunotherapeutics

Scinai Immunotherapeutics Ltd. is a biopharmaceutical company that specializes in inflammation and immunology (I&I) biological products. It operates two business units: one focused on developing therapeutic products, particularly nanosized VHH antibodies targeting diseases with large unmet medical needs, and the other providing CDMO services, including drug development and clinical trial execution, to early-stage biotech companies.

YTD Price Performance: -1.02%

Average Trading Volume: 11,275

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: $2.9M

data.title: BlockchainK2 Corp Updates on Cease Trade Order and Filing Delays
data.description:
BlockchainK2 ( (TSE:BITK) ) has issued an update.

BlockchainK2 Corp has provided an update on the management cease trade order (MCTO) issued by the British Columbia Securities Commission due to a delay in filing its audited financial statements for the year ended September 30, 2024. The delay was attributed to the auditors needing more time due to capacity constraints, and the company expects to complete the filings by March 31, 2025. The MCTO restricts the CEO and CFO from trading the company’s securities but does not affect shareholders. BlockchainK2 is committed to following the guidelines under National Policy 12-203, ensuring transparency through bi-weekly updates until the MCTO is revoked.

More about BlockchainK2

BlockchainK2 Corp operates in the blockchain industry, focusing on developing and managing blockchain-based solutions and services. The company is listed on multiple stock exchanges, including TSXV, OTCQB, and FSE, indicating a broad market focus.

YTD Price Performance: -35.71%

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: $1.42M

data.title: Horisont Energi’s 2024: Navigating Challenges and Securing Strategic Progress
data.description:
Horisont Energi AS ( (DE:9GJ) ) just unveiled an update.

In 2024, Horisont Energi faced challenges due to a slowdown in the green transition, impacting project timelines. Despite this, the company made significant commercial progress, secured strategic partnerships, and streamlined operations to ensure long-term value creation. Key developments included obtaining EU Project of Mutual Interest status for the Gismarvik CO2 hub, extending agreements, and signing non-binding term-sheets for gas supply and ammonia sales. Financially, the company reported reduced operating losses and maintained sufficient funding for project development into 2026, contingent on successful financing processes.

More about Horisont Energi AS

Horisont Energi is a company operating in the energy sector, focusing on green energy solutions and carbon capture initiatives. Its primary services include the development of CO2 hubs and green fuel corridors, with a market focus on connecting Northern Europe with other regions through sustainable energy projects.

data.title: Ferrari Updates Commercial Policy Amidst Import Tariff Concerns
data.description:
Ferrari ( (IT:RACE) ) has provided an announcement.

On March 27, 2025, Ferrari announced an update to its commercial policy in response to potential import tariffs on EU cars into the USA. While maintaining current commercial terms for certain models, Ferrari will implement up to a 10% price increase on other models, affecting its profitability margins slightly. Despite these changes, Ferrari remains confident in meeting its financial targets for 2025.

More about Ferrari

Ferrari N.V. is a prominent player in the luxury automotive industry, known for its high-performance sports cars and commitment to excellence. The company focuses on delivering premium vehicles with a strong emphasis on innovation and client satisfaction.

data.title: NDTV Announces Trading Window Closure in Compliance with SEBI Regulations
data.description:
New Delhi Television Limited ( (IN:NDTV) ) has shared an announcement.

New Delhi Television Limited has announced the closure of its trading window in compliance with SEBI’s insider trading regulations. This closure will be in effect from April 1, 2025, until 48 hours after the company declares its audited financial results for the quarter and financial year ending March 31, 2025. This move is part of the company’s adherence to regulatory standards, ensuring transparency and fairness in its financial disclosures, which is crucial for maintaining investor trust and market integrity.

More about New Delhi Television Limited

New Delhi Television Limited (NDTV) operates in the broadcasting industry, primarily offering news and current affairs programming. It is a prominent player in the Indian media landscape, known for its television news channels and digital content, catering to a wide audience across the country.
